# terrible_cisco_dnac_fabric_devices_info_workflow_manager (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `config` (String) List of dictionaries specifying fabric device query parameters.
- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this task against

### Optional

- `async_seconds` (Number) Run the task asynchronously, timing out after this many seconds. 0 = synchronous (default).
- `changed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered changed (e.g. 'false').
- `config_verify` (Boolean) Set to true to verify the Cisco Catalyst Center after applying the playbook config.
- `delegate_to_id` (String) ID of another terrible_host to delegate execution to.
- `environment` (String) Environment variables set for the task (dict of name→value).
- `failed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered failed.
- `ignore_errors` (Boolean) When true, a failed task does not raise a Terraform error.
- `poll_interval` (Number) Polling interval in seconds when async_seconds > 0. Defaults to 15.
- `skip_tags` (String) Skip tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `state` (String) The desired state of the configuration after module execution.
- `tags` (String) Run only tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `timeout` (Number) Override the default execution timeout (seconds). Defaults to 300.
- `triggers` (String) Arbitrary map of values; any change triggers task re-execution

### Read-Only

- `changed` (Boolean) Whether the task reported a change
- `id` (String) Unique task resource ID
- `response_all_info` (String) All fabric related information for filtered fabric devices. Returned for each fabric device matching the filters.
- `response_connected_device_info` (String) Connected device information for filtered fabric devices. Returned for each fabric device matching the filters.
- `response_device_health_info` (String) Health information for filtered fabric devices. Returned for each fabric device matching the filters.
- `response_device_issues_info` (String) Issue information for filtered fabric devices. Returned for each fabric device matching the filters.
- `response_fabric_devices_layer3_handoffs_sda_info` (String) Handoff information for filtered fabric devices. Returned for each fabric device matching the filters.
- `response_fabric_info` (String) Fabric information for filtered fabric devices Returned for each fabric device matching the filters.
- `response_info` (String) Returned when no fabric devices match the provided filters.
- `response_onboarding_info` (String) Onboarding information for filtered fabric devices. Returned for each fabric device matching the filters.
